summary: Completed final audit report and full-phase progress index; repository marked conditionally complete pending real human annotations.
notes: Scientific claims remain conditional until simulated annotations are replaced.

summary: Marked pre-migration result caveat in progress indexes pending rerun on migrated role/negation data.
Closed migration rerun caveat in phase indexes; project now aligned to migrated dataset outputs (annotation caveat remains).
Locked project to GitHub dataset-only scope (role+negation), reran probes/stats/salience/plots, and updated core docs + presentation to remove human-annotation dependency.
command: bash scripts/run_probes.sh && bash scripts/run_stats.sh && bash scripts/run_salience_and_plots.sh

summary: Revamped final presentation: abstracted dataset wording, removed repo/file references from slide content, added metric interpretation and new result figures, fixed footer/page numbering, resized overflowing figure, removed timeline slide, and added hyperlinks.
Fixed slide overflow defects from compiled PDF review: wrapped CSS protocol pipeline line, split coverage table and metric plot into separate slides, and repaired Frobenius heatmap title clipping.
Fixed metric means plot scaling by separating delta_l2 from cosine/frobenius/token-aligned to prevent bar compression.
Generated formal RQ1-RQ3 analysis tables/report, updated paper interpretation section, and added RQ-answer slides with new evidence figures.
command: uv run python scripts/analyze_results_for_rq.py && uv run python reports/slides/scripts/generate_presentation_figures.py

summary: Fixed RQ1 slide clipping by switching to a two-column layout with bounded plot height and side interpretation bullets.
Documented attachment/PP re-entry plan and explicit human-evaluation requirement conditions for future iterations.
